question: The concept of 'customer service excellence'
options: Remaining calm, empathetic and solution-focused
How likely customers are to recommend a business to others
Consistently meeting or exceeding customer expectations
Employees who receive services from colleagues within the same organisation
answer: Consistently meeting or exceeding customer expectations

question: 'Customer lifetime value' measures
options: Resolving a customer issue on the first interaction without follow-up
Loyalty programmes, personalised service and proactive communication
Consistently meeting or exceeding customer expectations
The total revenue a business can expect from a single customer over time
answer: The total revenue a business can expect from a single customer over time

question: The concept of 'service recovery'
options: How likely customers are to recommend a business to others
Actions taken to resolve a customer complaint and restore satisfaction
A commitment to deliver specific service standards within defined timeframes
The total revenue a business can expect from a single customer over time
answer: Actions taken to resolve a customer complaint and restore satisfaction

question: 'Net promoter score' (NPS) measures
options: How likely customers are to recommend a business to others
Actions taken to resolve a customer complaint and restore satisfaction
Consistently meeting or exceeding customer expectations
Visualising every interaction a customer has with an organisation
answer: How likely customers are to recommend a business to others
